title: trigonostemon whiteanus
intro: Trigonostemon whiteanus is a species of plant in the Euphorbiaceae family, commonly known as the White Trigonostemon or White Tung. It is native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating wounds and skin conditions. Trigonostemon whiteanus can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
